name: Happy Endings Plum Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Dark brown sugar; firmly packed
2 1/2 cups All-purpose flour; high altitude; add 2 tablespoons
2 tsp Baking powder; high altitude subtract 1/2 teaspoon
16 oz Can purple plums packed in syrup, well-drained, syrup reserved and plums chopped
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. In a large mixing bowl, beat the butter until creamy and light, then gradually add the sugars, beating until creamy and smooth. Beat in the eggs, then the vanilla. Sift the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon together. Stir the dry ingredients into the butter mixture, alternating with 2 tablespoons reserved syrup, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. Stir in the plums. Pour the batter into a buttered 9-by-13-inch pan. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center of the cake comes out clean. Turn off the heat and let the cake cool on a rack. Dust with confectioners' sugar. Makes 12 to 16 servings.
